compiled_state.title: Create security-red-team-output contract artifact
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Create the output schema contract for the security red team agent. This schema is the interface contract that the blue team (w22-7r1n) depends on.

### Implementation
Create plugins/dso/docs/contracts/security-red-team-output.md with:
- Signal Name: SECURITY_RED_TEAM_OUTPUT
- Emitter: code-reviewer-security-red-team agent
- Parser: security blue team agent (w22-7r1n), overlay dispatch (w22-25ui)
- Fields: findings array with per-finding: id, title, description, severity (critical/important/minor), confidence (high/medium/low), affected_files, taxonomy_category, rationale
- Example JSON payload
- Versioning notes

### Unit test exemption justification
This is a pure documentation file with no conditional logic. Any test would be a change-detector (grep for field names). Infrastructure-boundary-only (contract metadata).

### Files to create
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/security-red-team-output.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Contract file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/contracts/security-red-team-output.md
- [ ] Contract contains required sections (Signal Name, Emitter, Parser, Fields, Example)
  Verify: grep -q "Signal Name" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/security-red-team-output.md && grep -q "Emitter" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/security-red-team-output.md && grep -q "Fields" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/security-red-team-output.md
